scripts.scripts:prettier: prettier --write --log-level warn "./theme_components/js/**/*.js" && echo "Completed: Prettier for Scripts"
scripts.scripts:watch: chokidar 'theme_components/js/**/*.js' -c 'pnpm run scripts && pnpm run reload'
scripts.scripts: pnpm run clean:scripts && pnpm run scripts:prettier && (pnpm run scripts:webpack & pnpm run scripts:modernizr & wait) && echo "Completed: Scripts Task"
scripts.styles:prettier: prettier --write --log-level warn ./theme_components/sass/**/*.scss && echo "Completed: Prettier for Styles"
scripts.styles:lint: pnpm run styles:prettier && pnpm run styles:stylelint
scripts.styles:rename: ls ./assets/css | grep -Ev "\.min.css|.map" | xargs -I '{}' basename '{}' .css | xargs -I '{}' mv ./assets/css/{}.css ./assets/css/{}.min.css
scripts.styles: pnpm run clean:styles && pnpm run styles:lint && pnpm run styles:sass && pnpm run styles:rename && pnpm run styles:postcss && pnpm run styles:cleanup && echo "Completed: Styles Task"
scripts.static:assets:watch: chokidar 'theme_components/icons/**' 'theme_components/fonts/**' -c 'pnpm run static:assets && pnpm run reload'
scripts.static:assets: cp -r ./theme_components/fonts ./assets/ && cp -r ./theme_components/icons ./assets/ && echo "Completed: Static Assets Copy "
scripts.phpcs: echo "Starting PHPCS & PHPCBF Tasks" && pnpm run phpcs:fix && pnpm run phpcs:lint
scripts.images:mogrify:check: command -v mogrify >/dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm run images:optimize || { echo "Run 'brew install imagemagick' first. Or use your package manager to install imagemagick. Images will be copied but not optimized." >&2; return; }
scripts.images:optimize: find ./assets/images -type f | grep -E "png|jpg|jpeg" | xargs -P 4 -I '{}' mogrify -strip -resize '1500x1500>' -quality 70 '{}' && echo "Completed: Image Optimizations"
scripts.images:watch: chokidar 'theme_components/images/**/*.{jpg,jpeg,png,gif,svg}' -c 'pnpm run images && pnpm run reload'
scripts.images: pnpm run clean:images && pnpm run images:copy && pnpm run images:mogrify:check
scripts.build:message:
echo "
It might appear as if the tasks are running out of order, 
but they are running in parallel. This speeds up builds x2.
"
scripts.build:
pnpm run build:message && pnpm run clean && mkdir -p ./assets/ && (pnpm run static:assets & pnpm run scripts & pnpm run styles & pnpm run images & wait) && echo "
Build Complete"
scripts.build:pro: pnpm run build && mkdir -p ../core-wp-build && ls | grep -Ev "node|gulp|workspace|webpack|postcss|package|modernizr|theme_components|pnpm|todo" | xargs -I '{}' cp -r '{}' ../core-wp-build/
scripts.serve:all: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 pnpm run livereload & NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 pnpm run watch:all
scripts.serve: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 pnpm run livereload & NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 pnpm run watch
scripts.watch:code: pnpm run scripts:watch & pnpm run styles:watch
scripts.watch:all: pnpm run scripts:watch & pnpm run styles:watch & pnpm run static:assets:watch & pnpm run phpcs:watch & pnpm run html:watch & pnpm run images:watch
scripts.watch: pnpm run scripts:watch & pnpm run styles:watch & pnpm run static:assets:watch & pnpm run images:watch & pnpm run html:watch
